summary: Release v2026.2.21 was published on 2026-02-21 and adds Gemini 3.1 model support, Volcano Engine/BytePlus provider onboarding, per-channel model overrides, and Discord voice/streaming/subagent thread improvements.

Release v2026.2.19 (2026-02-19) introduces Apple Watch companion MVP, APNs wake/reconnect flows for iOS nodes, new paired-device cleanup CLI commands, and a security audit check for unauthenticated gateway HTTP mode.

Unreleased 2026.2.22 changelog lists breaking changes including removal of legacy gateway device-auth signature v1 and unified channel streaming config keys; it also adds security fixes such as stricter Feishu allowlist matching and default fail-closed group policy behavior when provider config is missing.
